first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations (2/10). The reasoning, strengths, and concerns are also substantively identical, focusing consistently on the candidate's lack of required hardware-specific experience (SoC, IP modeling, AI accelerators) for the role. The minor variations in phrasing between the two evaluations are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's location changing from Berlin to Lagos.
